name: Flhaunt
overview: The Documentarian investigates the livestreamed home invasion of Alice Purdy broadcast to thousands who watched her attacked by a killer. Doc interviews Alice's sister Des, who has checked into a rehabilitation center as a result of the traumatic events. Doc meets with Tara, who has been convicted of a heinous crime she claims she was forced to commit after watching a video with her best friend Ashley called "Share or Die".

trailers.title: FLHAUNT  - NEW HORROR SERIES WATCH NOW!
